title: Demon Lord's Descent
overview: Akira Onno ends up in another world of his own creation where he runs into a filthy girl shunned from her village who ends up calling him Demon Lord.

title: Golden Luna
overview: When one of the three Holy Maidens comes to dispatch the Demon Lord, Kunai is forced to resort to some old-fashioned discipline.

title: Killer Queen
overview: Luna's wild sister comes to take her away. But when trouble shows up to ruin everything, a new face comes to save the day.

title: Yu Kirino
overview: Kunai summons one of his underlings who lends Aku a helping hand. But being who it is, they may end up being more than he can handle.

title: Merciless Invasion
overview: On their way to the Holy Capital, the party runs into a small village with big problems and decides to take matters into their own hands.

title: Turmoil in the Capital
overview: While having a pleasant dinner banquet for Aku in the Holy Capital, the celebration is cut short by a dangerous cult with a thirst for blood.

title: All or Nothing
overview: As the Holy Castle comes under attack, the defenders get in over their heads. Kunai opts to send his replacement to take on the troublesome Demon.

title: Demon Lord's Handiwork
overview: After investigating the Seraph in the Holy Capital, Kunai and crew jump back to Rabby Village to get his money-making scheme underway.

title: Dancing Swindler and the Giant Gold Coin
overview: In order to prepare the hot spring resort for business, Kunai earns some much-needed funds by taking advantage of a merchant who doesn't know any better.

title: Madam Roars
overview: Luna tries to impress Madam Shrimpfry with a tour of the hot spring resort. Later on, Aku, Luna, Yu, and Tron all compete for Kunai's attention.

title: Yukikaze Attacks
overview: Kunai falls victim to Yukikaze's attack while on the hunt for information. Meanwhile, Angel takes it upon herself to rescue her little sister.

title: White Angel and Demon Lord
overview: During a surprise confrontation in the outdoor bath, Angel White finds out Kunai may be more than meets the eye.

title: ReTry
overview: Akira Oono was a game dev who wanted to build his own world, free from corporate oversight. But he had no idea that he'd get dragged into his own creation as Hakuto Kunai, the Demon Lord of the Great Empire! His adventure picks up where it left off!

title: ReStart
overview: Akira and Kunai reflect on how far the village of Rabby has come, and the prosperity lying ahead of it.

title: ReCycle
overview: Kunai heads to the town of Rookie to farm for magical items in the Prison Labyrinth there. He's accompanied by Mikan and Yukikaze, and sparks are sure to fly.

title: ReCruit
overview: News of Kunai's exploits reaches other nations around the world. How will they respond?

title: ReMind
overview: Eagle reminisces on her life after being separated from Luna as the situation with her comes to a head. Meanwhile, Kunai gets a surprise visitor with an equally surprising request.

title: ReUnion
overview: Things come to a head as all chaos breaks out around Eagle. Can she be saved?

title: ReMain
overview: After the chaos dies down, Kunai returns to Organ, and they continue their journey into the Beast Kingdom.

title: ReCovery
overview: Tensions flare up in Xenovia and their neighboring state of Parma as Kunai and gang continue their exploration of Beastkin territory.

title: ReQuest
overview: Kunai and Organ discuss their plans for their attack of Belphegor's castle, while Akane and Mink run off to make their own inroads.

title: ReScue
overview: Kunai and Organ begin their attack on Belphegor's castle, with Monkeymagic and his troops providing assistance.

title: ReSurrect
overview: The squad of raiders ends up meeting the lord of the castle and the primary target, Archfield Belphegor, and the outcome is less than desirable.

title: ReVenge
overview: Organ is in trouble, and it us up to Kunai to save the day.
